text:
is a series of computer games based on the anime series Neon Genesis Evangelion. It was developed and published by GAINAX, the majority of the games are Evangelion-themed versions of common card games, while Missions of Logic is a numerical grid puzzle game. All of the games were designed for Microsoft Windows 95/98.

Titles

A game of Daihinmin featuring Shinji, Rei, Asuka, Touji, Ritsuko, Misato, Kaji, Gendo and Kaworu. The minimum requirements for this game are: a Pentium computer with 16MB RAM, 640 x 480 resolution monitors, 5MB of disk space, and a Windows 95-J operating system. Early editions of the game came with a limited edition Asuka coin bank.

Shinji and Good Friends: Is That Solitaire? (26 February 1999)
Shinji and Good Friends: Missions of Logic (28 May 1999)
Shinji and Good Friends: Second Hanafuda Impact (04 June 1999)
Shinji and Good Friends: Bakuretsu Daifūgō (23 July 1999)
Shinji and Good Friends: Buongiorno! 7 nara be (27 August 1999)
Shinji and Good Friends: AMERICAN PAGE1 (24 September 1999)
